title: Velvety Smoked Spanish Garlic Stir-fry
description: A herbal and velvety light polish dish featuring sea salt, smoke, dash-friendly flavors that come together in a quick stir-fry.

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: optional, for added depth of flavor

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable oil and swirl to coat.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and sauté for about 3 minutes until slightly softened.
Add the minced garlic cloves (adjust quantity based on preference). Stir-fry for another minute, being careful not to burn.
If using smoked paprika, add it now and stir well into the vegetables. Taste with sea salt flakes; adjust seasoning as needed.
Turn off the heat immediately after adding the sea salt. The sudden cold will help preserve the flavors and prevent burning of the garlic.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
